title: Backup Logical error: 'Creation of a file under the virtual directory is not possible'
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Start MinIO with `tests/docker_scripts/setup_minio.sh stateless`, then in config.xml:
```xml
<storage_configuration>
<disks>
<disk0>
<type>object_storage</type>
<object_storage_type>s3</object_storage_type>
<metadata_type>plain_rewritable</metadata_type>
<endpoint>...minio...</endpoint>
<access_key_id>....</access_key_id>
<secret_access_key>....</secret_access_key>
</disk0>
</disks>
</storage_configuration>
<backups>
<allowed_disk>disk0</allowed_disk>
</backups>
```
Then run:
```sql
CREATE DATABASE d0 ENGINE = Atomic;
CREATE TABLE d0.t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
BACKUP DATABASE d0 TO Disk('disk0', 'backup0'); --Logical error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'Creation of a file under the virtual directory is not possible'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x0000000024b0e3b2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:129: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x000000001507fc29
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d61b5ce
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d61afd1
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<>) @ 0x000000000d627ff6
5. src/Disks/ObjectStorages/InMemoryDirectoryTree.cpp:314: DB::InMemoryDirectoryTree::addFile(String const&) @ 0x000000001a19a773
6. src/Disks/ObjectStorages/MetadataStorageFromPlainObjectStorageOperations.cpp:326: DB::MetadataStorageFromPlainObjectStorageWriteFileOperation::execute() @ 0x000000001a188f1b
7. src/Disks/ObjectStorages/MetadataOperationsHolder.cpp:60: DB::MetadataOperationsHolder::commit() @ 0x000000001a16b4e9
8. src/Disks/ObjectStorages/MetadataStorageFromPlainObjectStorage.cpp:371: DB::MetadataStorageFromPlainObjectStorageTransaction::commit(std::variant<std::monostate, DB::MetaInKeeperCommitOptions<zkutil::ZooKeeper>, DB::MetaInKeeperCommitOptions<DB::ZooKeeperWithFaultInjection>> const&) @ 0x000000001a1784b0
9. src/Disks/ObjectStorages/IMetadataStorage.h:58: DB::DiskObjectStorageTransaction::commit(std::variant<std::monostate, DB::MetaInKeeperCommitOptions<zkutil::ZooKeeper>, DB::MetaInKeeperCommitOptions<DB::ZooKeeperWithFaultInjection>> const&) @ 0x000000001a1379af
10. src/Disks/ObjectStorages/DiskObjectStorageTransaction.h:80: DB::DiskObjectStorageTransaction::commit() @ 0x000000001a1463d4
11. src/IO/WriteBuffer.cpp:95: DB::WriteBuffer::finalize() @ 0x00000000151817b0
12. src/Backups/BackupIO_Default.cpp:76: DB::BackupWriterDefault::copyDataToFile(String const&, std::function<std::unique_ptr<DB::SeekableReadBuffer, std::default_delete<DB::SeekableReadBuffer>> ()> const&, unsigned long, unsigned long) @ 0x0000000019886fd9

14. src/Backups/BackupsWorker.cpp:763: DB::BackupsWorker::writeBackupEntries(std::shared_ptr<DB::IBackup>, std::vector<std::pair<String, std::shared_ptr<DB::IBackupEntry const>>, std::allocator<std::pair<String, std::shared_ptr<DB::IBackupEntry const>>>>&&, String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IBackupCoordination>, bool, std::shared_ptr<DB::QueryStatus>)::$_0::operator()() const @ 0x0000000019873261
15. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x0000000016859b8a
16. src/Common/threadPoolCallbackRunner.h:183: DB::ThreadPoolCallbackRunnerLocal<void, ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>, std::function<void ()>>::operator()(std::function<void ()>&&, Priority, std::optional<unsigned long>)::'lambda'()::operator()() @ 0x000000001685995f
17. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x00000000151c3453
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE d1.t1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE d1.t2 (ref_id INT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO d1.t2 (ref_id, description) SELECT id, name FROM d1.t1 WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Backup to virtual directory fails with logical error
